mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT t.* FROM tag t INNER JOIN diary_tag dt ON dt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE dt.diary_id = #{diaryId} ORDER BY t.name ASC
SELECT * FROM tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND name = #{name}
SELECT * FROM tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
SELECT * FROM tag WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT * FROM tag WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND name = #{name}
SELECT * FROM tag WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tag (user_id, space_id, name, color) VALUES (#{userId},
#{spaceId} (SELECT space_id FROM diary_space WHERE personal_owner_id = #{userId}) , #{name}, #{color})
